DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-13-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT CHILDREN'S COUNCIL OF SAN FRANCISCO DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Demurrer sustained with ten days leave to amend as to seventh cause of action only. Plaintiff fails to distinguish "failure to take a corrective action" as a separate cause of action from harassment. Demurrer overruled as to all other causes of action.
